route.name: Oak Avenue to Broadway Commute
route.description: Walking and biking commute route from 45 Oak Avenue to 1800 Broadway, Boulder, CO

segments.name: Oak Avenue
segments.notes: Quiet residential street with American Elm canopy. Sidewalks on both sides. Low traffic, safe.

segments.name: 19th Street
segments.notes: Major N-S arterial. Use east-side sidewalk for safety. Bike lane or sharrows. 4-lane road.

segments.name: 20th Street
segments.notes: Light-traffic connector between 19th Street and Pearl Street. Low-speed road.

segments.name: Pearl Street
segments.notes: Pearl Street Mall area. Pedestrianized zone with shops and cafes. Optional coffee stop.

segments.name: Pearl Street to Broadway
segments.notes: Continue south on Pearl Street toward downtown. Signalized crossings.

segments.name: 18th Street
segments.notes: Approaches downtown Boulder. Moderate traffic; bike lane or sharrows present.

segments.name: Canyon Boulevard
segments.notes: Dedicated, separated bike lane (~2.0m width with buffer). Bike-specific signal phases. Well-lit. Boulder's safest bike corridor.
